subject: Regulations Amending Schedule 1 to the Impact Assessment Act (Miscellaneous Program)
precis: Regulations Amending Schedule 1 to the Impact Assessment Act (Miscellaneous Program) in order to repeal and replace certain terminology to align with the cross-referenced statutes.
